comments.comment: In 2006, LUP operated for 362 days vs. 330 days in 2005, a 10% increase. (consequently, 9% more combustion fuel was burned).  In 2006, LUP changed its fuel mix from 2005 by decreasing #6 oil use by 53% and increasing natural gas use by 450%.
